request_payload.exposure_text: As someone who values practical preparedness, I've noticed how civil defense programs actually strengthen national security without compromising liberties. My local community's modest investments in emergency response training have paid off - when that tornado warning came last year, we were ready. Why spend billions overseas when we can build resilience at home? #CommonSenseSecurity #PreparedNotScared
